**By anu**

* * *

Chalo Dilli – What is it? Is it an Ad campaign, is it a quest or is it an appeal. Well, I think more than anything else, it is like a ‘Mission Statement’ or rather it should be taken as one by the Delhi Government and by those living in Delhi.

[More..](http://blog.ccsindia.org/mt/archives/2006/03/chalo_dilli_a_a_1.html#more)
